About Us

Greater Noida's Most Trusted
Real Estate Partner

Gold Max Realty (GMR) has been at the forefront of Greater Noida's real estate landscape for over a decade. Headquartered at the prestigious Omaxe India Trade Centre, Alpha-2, we bring unparalleled market knowledge, transparency and a client-first philosophy to every transaction.

Whether you are a first-time home buyer, an experienced investor or a business seeking the perfect commercial space — our team of dedicated real estate professionals is committed to making your property journey seamless, informed and rewarding.

  • Deep expertise in Greater Noida and NCR real estate markets
  • Verified listings with transparent pricing and documentation
  • End-to-end support from property search to registration
  • Exclusive access to pre-launch and off-market opportunities
  • Post-purchase assistance and investment advisory

What We Do

Our Services

Comprehensive real estate services designed to guide you at every step of your property journey.

01
🏘️Residential

Residential Properties

Apartments, independent floors, villas and plots across premium residential sectors of Greater Noida. Find your perfect home with verified listings and transparent pricing.

02
🏢Commercial

Commercial Spaces

Retail shops, office spaces, showrooms and commercial plots in strategic business locations. Grow your business in the right environment with our expert guidance.

03
🌍Land & Plots

Plots & Land

Residential and commercial plots in authority-approved sectors. Build your dream project from the ground up with clear title, proper documentation and prime locations.

04
📈Investment

Property Investment

Expert investment advisory for high-yield real estate opportunities. Pre-launch properties, under-construction projects and resale assets with strong ROI potential.

05
📋Legal & Documentation

Legal Assistance

End-to-end documentation support including registry, mutation, title verification and legal due diligence. We ensure every transaction is clean, compliant and hassle-free.

06
🏦Finance

Home Loan Assistance

Seamless home loan facilitation with leading banks and NBFCs. We help you secure the best interest rates, navigate approvals and handle all loan-related paperwork.

Why Choose Us

Reasons to Trust GMR

01
10+ Years of Local Expertise

Deep-rooted knowledge of Greater Noida's real estate market — from sector dynamics to price trends and upcoming developments.

02
Verified & Transparent Listings

Every property in our portfolio is thoroughly verified — clear title, legal compliance and zero hidden charges. What you see is what you get.

03
End-to-End Service

From your first property visit to final registry — we manage every step so you can focus on your life, not paperwork.

04
Exclusive Off-Market Access

Our extensive network gives clients access to pre-launch prices, builder deals and off-market properties unavailable elsewhere.

05
Zero-Pressure Approach

We believe in informed decisions. Our consultants guide — never pressure. Your timeline, your budget, your choice.

Why Invest Here

Why Greater Noida is
India's Smartest Investment

Greater Noida is one of India's fastest-growing planned cities — with world-class infrastructure, connectivity and unmatched real estate appreciation potential.

🚇

Metro Connectivity

Aqua Line Metro connects Greater Noida directly to Noida and Delhi — making it ideal for working professionals and investors seeking high rental yields.

🛣️

Yamuna Expressway

165 km expressway connecting Greater Noida to Agra. Proximity to Jewar International Airport (IATA Approved) makes this location a future hotspot.

✈️

Jewar Airport

India's largest upcoming international airport — just 30 km from Alpha-2. Expected to drive property values by 40–60% in surrounding sectors by 2026.

🏗️

Master Planned City

GNIDA master plan with wide roads, green zones, dedicated industrial sectors and world-class social infrastructure — all within walking distance.

📈

12–18% Appreciation

Greater Noida properties have consistently delivered 12–18% year-on-year appreciation — outperforming most Indian real estate markets over the last 5 years.

🎓

Education & Healthcare

Home to top institutions — Amity University, Sharda University, Kailash Hospital — making it a preferred destination for families and long-term residents.
